Apache Juneau
  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Use

  • Index
  • Help

Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore

Packages that use BeanStore
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp
Classpath Utilities
org.apache.juneau.marshall.encoders
Encoders
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.microservice
Microservice API
org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest
Petstore REST resources.
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock
REST Server Mock API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.jwt
JWT bearer-token validation backed by com.nimbusds:nimbus-jose-jwt.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter
REST Response Converters
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug
REST Debug APIs
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard
REST Guards
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
Built-in health, readiness, and liveness probe support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger
REST Logging API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.matcher
Predefined Matchers
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi
Server-side OpenAPI 3.1 emission — the OpenApiProvider SPI and the BasicOpenApiProvider default implementation that walks an RestContext and produces an OpenApi document.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor
HTTP Response Processors
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
Spring Boot Integration
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats
Method exec stats utilities
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger
REST Swagger Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.validation
Optional Jakarta Bean Validation 3.x integration for juneau-rest-server — declarative validation of request beans via jakarta.validation.constraints.* annotations.

  • Uses of BeanStore in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean that return BeanStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BeanStore
    BeanConfigContext.getBeanStore()
    Returns the active BeanStore used for factory-based bean instantiation, or null if none configured.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean with parameters of type BeanStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    BeanConfigContext.Builder.beanStore(BeanStore value)
    Sets the active BeanStore used for factory-based bean instantiation.

  • Uses of BeanStore in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject

    Subinterfaces of BeanStore in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    WritableBeanStore
    Extends BeanStore with methods for adding beans.
    Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject that implement BeanStore
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BasicBeanStore
    Basic implementation of WritableBeanStore.
    final class 
    StackOverlay
    Stack-aware BeanStore overlay.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject that return BeanStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BeanStore
    ConditionContext.beanStore()
    Returns the value of the beanStore record component.
    BeanStore
    StackOverlay.peek()
    Returns the top frame on the stack without removing it.
    BeanStore
    StackOverlay.pop()
    Pops the top frame off the stack.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject with parameters of type BeanStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.of(Class<T> beanType, BeanStore parentStore)
    Creates a new bean creator builder with a parent bean store.
    static <T> BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    BeanInstantiator.of(Class<T> beanType, BeanStore parentStore, String name, Object enclosingInstance)
    Creates a new bean creator builder with a parent bean store, name, and enclosing instance.
    B
    BeanStoreOverridable.overridingBeanStore(BeanStore store)
    Installs the supplied BeanStore as the overridingParent of the underlying bean store used by this builder during construction-time reflective injection.
    StackOverlay
    StackOverlay.push(BeanStore overlay)
    Pushes a new overlay frame onto the top of the stack.
    Snapshot
    BasicBeanStore.pushOverlay(BeanStore overlay)
     
    Snapshot
    WritableBeanStore.pushOverlay(BeanStore overlay)
    Pushes the supplied BeanStore onto this store's overlay stack.
    static Object
    ValueResolver.resolve(String expression, Class<?> targetType, Type genericTargetType, String siteDescription, BeanStore beanStore)
    Same as ValueResolver.resolve(String, Class, Type, String) but consults caller-scoped PropertySource beans resolved from the supplied BeanStore.
    static Object
    ValueResolver.resolve(String expression, Class<?> targetType, String siteDescription, BeanStore beanStore)
    Same as ValueResolver.resolve(String, Class, String) but consults caller-scoped PropertySource beans resolved from the supplied BeanStore between the Settings local/global override stores and the Settings sources chain.
    Constructors in org.apache.juneau.commons.inject with parameters of type BeanStore
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    BasicBeanStore(BeanStore parent)
    Constructor.
     
    BasicBeanStore(BeanStore parent, BeanStore overridingParent)
    Constructor that accepts an overriding parent bean store.
    protected
    Builder(Class<T> beanType, BeanStore parentStore, String name, Object enclosingInstance)
    Constructor.
     
    ConditionContext(BeanStore beanStore, Settings settings, ClassLoader classLoader, AnnotatedElement annotatedElement)
    Creates an instance of a ConditionContext record class.

  • Uses of BeanStore in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect with parameters of type BeanStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    ParameterInfo.canResolve(BeanStore beanStore, Object... otherBeans)
    Checks if this parameter can be resolved from the bean store.
    boolean
    ConstructorInfo.canResolveAllParameters(BeanStore beanStore, Object enclosingInstance, Object... otherBeans)
    Checks if all constructor parameters can be resolved.
    boolean
    MethodInfo.canResolveAllParameters(BeanStore beanStore, Object... otherBeans)
    Checks if all method parameters can be resolved.
    String
    ConstructorInfo.getMissingParameterTypes(BeanStore beanStore, Object enclosingInstance, Object... otherBeans)
    Returns comma-delimited list of missing parameter types.
    String
    MethodInfo.getMissingParameterTypes(BeanStore beanStore, Object... otherBeans)
    Returns comma-delimited list of missing parameter types.
    String
    ParameterInfo.getMissingType(BeanStore beanStore, Object... otherBeans)
    Returns the missing type name if this parameter cannot be resolved, null otherwise.
    <T> T
    ClassInfo.inject(T bean, BeanStore beanStore)
    Injects beans from the bean store into the specified object's fields and methods.
    <T> T
    ConstructorInfo.inject(BeanStore beanStore, Object enclosingInstance, Object... otherBeans)
    Resolves parameters from the bean store and invokes the constructor.
    <T> T
    FieldInfo.inject(BeanStore beanStore, T bean)
    Resolves field value from the bean store and sets it on the specified bean instance.
    <T> T
    MethodInfo.inject(BeanStore beanStore, Object bean, Object... otherBeans)
    Resolves parameters from the bean store and invokes the method.
    Object
    ParameterInfo.resolveValue(BeanStore beanStore, Object... otherBeans)
    Resolves the parameter value from the bean store.
    Object
    ParameterInfo.resolveValue(BeanStore beanStore, Object enclosingInstance, Object... otherBeans)
    Resolves the parameter value from the bean store (constructor version with enclosingInstance).

    Method
    Description
    RestAuthenticator
    RestServlet.createAuthenticator(BeanStore beanStore)
    Returns the resource-level authenticator for this servlet, or null to fall through to the @Rest(authenticator=...) annotation / registered bean / @Bean factory method.

    class 
    SpringBeanStore
    A bean store that uses Spring bean resolution to find beans if they're not already in this store.

    Description
    static <T extends jakarta.servlet.Servlet>
    org.springframework.boot.web.servlet.ServletRegistrationBean<T>
    JuneauServletRegistrations.forServlet(T servlet, BeanStore beanStore)
    Builds a ServletRegistrationBean for the supplied Juneau servlet, mapping it at the top-level paths it self-declares.

    static <T> T
    BeanValidator.validate(T bean, BeanStore beanStore)
